name: SmartOnFhirV2DiscoveryHasPatientScope
title: SMART on FHIR v2 — discovery document advertises patient/* scopes
description: Per SMART App Launch IG v2 §3, patient-context scopes (patient/*.read, patient/Observation.read, etc.) are the foundation of patient-facing SMART apps. Servers SHOULD list at least one patient/ scope in scopes_supported in the discovery document. Servers without patient/ scopes can only support practitioner-launched workflows.

test.name: Discovery document mentions a patient/ scope
